title: Synoptic Temperature Extremes
description: 6-hour and 24-hour temperature extremes from METAR remarks (1xxxx, 2xxxx, 4xxxx groups). Separate from hourly observations because they have different frequency: 6hr extremes at synoptic hours (00/06/12/18Z), 24hr extremes once daily (~06Z). Also includes precipitation accumulators and pressure tendency. The 6hr/24hr extreme groups encode whole-°F native ASOS readings as tenths-°C (same Tgroup-as-display-precision rule as observation.v1's temp_c) — the 0.1°C precision is a coded representation, not independent source resolution; values map 1:1 to whole °F.

max_temp_6hr_c.description: 6-hour maximum temperature in Celsius. The 1xxxx METAR remark group encodes a whole-°F native ASOS reading as tenths-°C; 0.1°C is display precision, not source resolution. Maps 1:1 to whole °F.

min_temp_6hr_c.description: 6-hour minimum temperature in Celsius. Same Tgroup-as-display-precision rule as max_temp_6hr_c — the 2xxxx remark group encodes a whole-°F native ASOS reading.

max_temp_6hr_f.description: 6-hour max converted to Fahrenheit. No rounding at ingest.

max_temp_24hr_c.description: 24-hour max temperature in Celsius. The 4xxxx remark group encodes a whole-°F native ASOS reading as tenths-°C (display precision, not source resolution). Once daily. SETTLEMENT CROSS-VALIDATION: should correlate with CLI high_temp_f at integer-°F granularity.

min_temp_24hr_c.description: 24-hour min temperature in Celsius. Same Tgroup-as-display-precision rule as max_temp_24hr_c. Correlates with CLI low_temp_f at integer-°F granularity.

precip_3hr_inches.description: 3-hour precipitation accumulation. From 6nnnn group at synoptic times.

pressure_tend_hpa.description: 3-hour pressure tendency in hPa. DERIVED. Positive = rising, negative = falling. From 5appp group.

$comment: SEPARATE ENTITY from observations because: (1) Different frequency (4x/day for 6hr, 1x/day for 24hr vs 24x/day for hourly METAR). (2) Avoids 20-23 null rows per day in hourly observations. (3) Different use case: settlement cross-validation, not real-time trading signals. (4) Parquet partition: synoptic_extremes/station={CODE}/{YEAR}.parquet
